title: Motivosity Earns Brandon Hall Group Smartchoice® Preferred Solution Provider Certification
author: Unknown
description: Motivosity has been certified as a Smartchoice® Preferred Solution Provider by Brandon Hall Group, an independent HCM analyst firm. The certification validates Motivosity's people-first approach to employee recognition and rewards, particularly for hybrid and distributed workforces. The platform focuses on building human connection through employee-to-employee connections, manager-employee relationships, and employee-company alignment.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned only briefly in a secondary headline regarding a partnership integration. No substantive details provided about the partnership impact or significance.

title: Michael Haske to Become isolved CEO as Company Embarks on Next Phase of AI-Led Growth
author: Na
description: isolved announced a planned CEO transition effective May 4, 2026, with Mark Duffell retiring after leading the company since 2020 and Michael Haske, a veteran HCM technology executive, assuming the role. Under Duffell's tenure, isolved achieved nearly fourfold revenue growth and now serves over 200,000 employers and 9 million employees. Haske plans to position isolved as a 'Platform of Action' by integrating agentic AI and advanced automation capabilities.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Mentioned as a company where incoming CEO Michael Haske previously worked for 16 years and helped scale to $1 billion in revenue. This is contextual information about Haske's background rather than news directly affecting Paylocity's operations or outlook.
Mentioned only as part of incoming CEO's career history where he began his career. No direct business impact or news related to ADP is discussed.
Mentioned only as part of incoming CEO's prior employment history where he spent 10 years. No direct business impact or news related to Paychex is discussed.

title: Paylocity Launches Elevate Solutions to Help HR and Payroll Teams Scale More Efficiently
author: Na
description: Paylocity announced Paylocity Elevate Solutions, a new offering combining its unified HCM platform with dedicated operational support teams to manage HR and payroll work on behalf of clients. The service includes implementation support, payroll administration, and ongoing HR operations, designed to help organizations scale without adding headcount.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Paylocity is launching a new service offering (Elevate Solutions) that expands its value proposition by combining software with managed services. This represents business expansion, increased revenue opportunities, and strengthened client relationships. Customer testimonial indicates satisfaction and confidence in the offering.

title: Paylocity Named Official HCM Partner of the New York Islanders and Official Partner of UBS Arena
author: Nicole Andergard
description: Paylocity has signed a five-year partnership with the New York Islanders, becoming their Official Human Capital Management Partner. The agreement includes providing HR and payroll solutions and supporting the team's Recycle the Game program to help youth hockey.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Expanding business footprint, establishing strategic partnership, supporting community initiatives

title: Paylocity and Chicago Bulls Join Forces in Hometown Partnership to Empower Teams On and Off the Court
author: Allison Windon
description: Paylocity, a cloud-based HR solutions provider, has partnered with the Chicago Bulls in a multi-year sponsorship, becoming their Official HCM Software Partner and supporting a community youth basketball program.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Expanding brand visibility through strategic partnership with a prominent sports team, supporting community initiatives, and highlighting technological capabilities
